steps.title: Spot the defining claim
steps.content: The first clause marks upper-atmospheric jets reaching the ionosphere as outliers due to extreme altitudes (80+ km). The transition must show how the second clause (about most jets reaching lower heights) connects to this claim.

steps.title: Match the logical relationship
steps.content: The second clause provides evidence explaining why they're outliers: most jets reach only 20–50 km, making the 80+ km jets extreme by comparison. Indeed means “in fact” or “truly,” introducing supporting evidence that elaborates the outlier claim. The other three either imply a causal result, introduce separate information, or signal contrast—relationships not present here. That matches choice B — B is correct.
